ecom_items.description: Enjoy precise cooking in style with this Samsung Bespoke range. Air Fry creates deliciously crispy treats without excess grease, while Air Sous Vide provides tender, flavourful meats. The in-oven camera makes it easy to check on meals from your phone, so you don't have to open the door and let hot air escape. Plus, illuminated control knobs add chic style while making it easy to see which burners are on at a quick glance. Once dinner's done, ensure a sparkling clean oven thanks to both self-clean and steam clean options.
ecom_items.name: Samsung 6.3 Cu. Ft. Smart Electric Slide In Range with Oven Camera - White Glass - NSE6DB870012AC

ecom_items.description: This bottom-freezer refrigerator from Smeg is designed with a chic retro style and equipped with the latest technology for top performance. Featuring chrome interior finishing, electronic temperature control, three freezer drawers, a multi-flow cooling system and LED lighting on both sides of the cabinet, this fridge is ready to impress. Plus, the no-frost freezer section offers a spacious capacity with the added usefulness of a fast-freeze drawer. Fusing an unmistakable sense of aesthetic flair with peerless manufacturing, Smeg knows how to deliver style and substance in equal measure.
ecom_items.name: Smeg 11.7 Cu. Ft. Retro Bottom-Freezer Refrigerator - FAB32URCR3
